title: Rijeka、Primorje-Gorski Kotar — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Rijeka、Primorje-Gorski Kotarの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

RijekaはPrimorje-Gorski Kotarにある人口128,384の都市です。Croatia’s major port city, a 2020 European Capital of Culture with a rich maritime heritage, Austro-Hungarian architecture, and a vibrant industrial history.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
